nasb.text: Say to them, ‘If any man among all your descendants throughout your generations approaches the holy gifts which the sons of Israel dedicate to the Lord, while he has an uncleanness, that person shall be cut off from before Me; I am the Lord.

esv.text: Say to them, ‘If any one of all your offspring throughout your generations approaches the holy things that the people of Israel dedicate to the Lord, while he has an uncleanness, that person shall be cut off from my presence: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要對他們說：你們世世代代的後裔中，若是不潔淨，卻接近以色列人分別為聖歸耶和華的聖物，那人必從我面前被剪除；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 把以下条例告诉他们。 “你们的后代中，如果有人不洁净，却接近以色列人献给我的圣物，必须把他从我面前铲除。我是耶和华。
